name: salesforce-commerce
description: Expert subagent and skills for Salesforce Commerce development — B2C Commerce Cloud (SFCC/Demandware) with SFRA cartridges, ISML templating, SCAPI/OCAPI APIs, PWA Kit headless storefronts, and B2B/D2C Commerce on Lightning with Apex hooks, LWC components, Experience Builder, Einstein AI recommendations, Salesforce Payments, and JavaScript/TypeScript/React patterns.
